news.t: Free Cash Flow Can Help Navigate the Small-Cap Profitability Problem
SFLO: Go with the Flow with This Cash Flow ETF

holdings.infoBox: SFLO is an equity ETF with a total of 199 individual holdings. The top holdings are Oscar Health stock at 2.60%, Jazz Pharmaceuticals at 1.45%, Crocs at 1.43%, Lyft, Inc. at 1.40%, and Scorpio Tankers at 1.31%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares Small Cap Free Cash Flow ETF (SFLO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Victory US Small Cap Free Cash Flow index. The fund tracks an index composed of 200 small-cap US companies based on profit that are perceived to have strong free cash flow yields and high growth metrics. SFLO was launched on Dec 21, 2023 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Victory US Small Cap Free Cash Flow Index
